answer:
Oh, definitely! One that really stands out to me is this message I received from my best friend on my birthday last year. So, I woke up expecting just the usual “Happy Birthday” texts, right? But this was something different. She sent me this long voice note where she not only wished me a happy birthday but also shared some really heartfelt memories we had together over the years.

I mean, she talked about that time we took that road trip and got lost for hours, laughing non-stop as we tried to figure out where we were going. It was hilarious, honestly. And, she even mentioned how much I’ve grown as a person and how she admired my resilience through tough times. That really hit home for me. It was like a warm hug through my phone.

What made it even more special was that she wrapped it up by saying she was always going to be there for me, no matter what. I guess it just really reminded me of the strong bond we share. It was such a lovely surprise, and it totally made my day!
title: Tell me about a special message someone sent to you.

{"pronuncFile":"/20250327/573e66595eee4f87b4a5f8040445edfb.mp3","answerTemplate":"开场陈述：  
“Begin by introducing the message: One memorable message I received was from [the person who sent it, e.g., a friend, family member] on [occasion or reason for the message].”

正文：  
关于信息内容的描述：  
“Explain what the message said: The message conveyed [main points or feelings, such as love, appreciation, encouragement].”  
强调其重要性：  
“I found this message particularly special because [reason, such as it came at a crucial time or reflected our relationship].”

关于个人影响：  
“Discuss how it affected you: Receiving this message made me feel [emotion, such as valued, supported, motivated], and it reminded me of [related memory or lesson].”  
提及任何采取的行动：  
“As a result, I [action taken, such as reached out to them, expressed gratitude, or changed my perspective].”

结论：  
总结信息的重要性：  
“In conclusion, that message stands out in my memory because it [impact or value it had on you].”  
最后的反思：  
“It’s amazing how a few words can [effect, such as uplift someone’s spirits or strengthen a bond].”","titleTranslate":"告诉我有人给你发过的特别的信息。"}
